meaning: n.法国加斯科涅(Gascony)的人,吹牛的人
examples: Gascon will have plenty more opportunities to take gold -- she's competing in six more races.
When Thomas Boleyn has gone, Cromwell shares a cup of Gascon wine with one of his officers.
Foulkes reportedly told Gascon that the next two generations of iPhones have already been developed and they preceded Cook.
